home.emptyHomeBody: When communities start posting, trending posts will appear here.
home.emptyHomeVerifyBody: Verify your account before you make your first post.
home.emptyYourCommunitiesBody: Communities you create or join show up here.
home.title: Home

yourCommunities.emptyJoinedLabel: Communities you join will appear here.
yourCommunities.signedOutBody: Save the communities you join and pick up where you left off.
yourCommunities.subtitle: A member-scoped feed shell. Keep it tight on mobile and let the sidebar carry the heavier navigation.
yourCommunities.title: Your Communities

post.commentsBody: Thread replies are not scaffolded yet. This route exists to pin the URL contract and page chrome for `post_id` reads.
post.description: Single-thread route shell for the future `GET /posts/{post_id}` read.

joinRequest.title: Request to join
joinRequest.description: Tell the moderators why you want to join. Include links or proof that show you are eligible.
joinRequest.submittedDescription: The moderators will review your request.

interactionGate.blockedReplyDescription: This community's requirements block you from replying right now.
interactionGate.blockedVoteDescription: This community's requirements block you from voting right now.
interactionGate.couldNotCheckRequirements: Couldn't check this community's interaction requirements.
interactionGate.verifyToReplyDescription: Start the community's ID check, then return to reply.
interactionGate.verifyToVoteDescription: Start the community's ID check, then return to vote.
interactionGate.bannedDescription: You are not eligible to join this community.

access.imagePaidDescription: Preview in feed. Full image unlocks after purchase.
access.imagePublicDescription: Anyone can view the full image.
access.imageRightsAttested: I have the rights to publish and monetize this image.
access.paidDescription: Preview in feed. Full media unlocks after purchase.
access.publicDescription: Anyone can play the full media.
access.rightsAttested: I have the rights to publish and monetize this media.
access.textPaidDescription: Preview in feed. Full post unlocks after purchase.
access.textPublicDescription: Anyone can read the full post.
access.textRightsAttested: I have the rights to publish and monetize this post.

audience.communityDescription: Joined members can read this post.
audience.publicDisabledReason: This community already limits who can read posts.

derivative.acceptSourceTerms: I understand and accept the selected source license terms for this remix.

empty.noOptionalQualifiers: No optional qualifiers are available for this community.

identity.qualifiersHelp: Attach verified qualifiers to this post. Qualifiers already implied by community gates are omitted.

song.non-commercialDescription: Listeners can use the song privately, but not for commercial releases.
song.commercial-useDescription: Others can monetize with the original song, but cannot release remixes.
song.commercial-remixDescription: Others can monetize and publish remixes of your song.
song.revenueShareDescription: Choose the share derivative remix revenue owes back to this original track.

video.non-commercialDescription: Viewers can use the video privately, but not for commercial releases.
video.commercial-useDescription: Others can monetize with the original video, but cannot publish derivative videos.
video.commercial-remixDescription: Others can monetize and publish derivative videos using your work.
video.revenueShareDescription: Set the share of derivative video revenue paid back to this original video.

createPost.membershipRequiredDescription: Only community members can publish posts here.
createPost.verifyRequiredDescription: Complete your palm scan before you make your first post.
createPost.title: Create post

upload.artworkHelp: Shows in feed, release, and player surfaces.

live.collaboratorNote: Invite a collaborator for this duet session.
live.soloProceedsDescription: The host receives 100% of performer-side proceeds.
live.duetProceedsDescription: Split performer-side proceeds between host and collaborator.
live.emptySetlist: No songs yet. Add at least one song before going live.

redditImport.title: Verify Reddit
redditImport.subtitle: Provide your Reddit username to get a better domain on .pirate and personalized recommendations.

claimDomain.title: Claim Domain
claimDomain.subtitle: Pirate domains are URLs that can be sold or traded. Choose wisely.

onboarding.description: Single onboarding route with client-managed phases. No nested onboarding URLs are locked yet.

notes.addCodeToProfile: Paste into your Reddit profile description
notes.noSuggestionsYet: No community suggestions yet. Join some from your feed later.

onboarding.title: Finish setup
onboarding.verifyPendingDescription: Complete the palm scan in the Very.org app.
onboarding.verifyStartDescription: Use Very to scan your palm. The photo is not saved or stored.

inbox.body: Keep `/inbox` as a neutral placeholder until notifications or messaging are specified as real product surfaces.
inbox.description: This route is scaffolded so the mobile nav can point somewhere truthful while inbox behavior is still undefined.
inbox.title: Notifications
inbox.installPromoBody: Never miss a payout with Pirate on your homescreen
inbox.installPromoIOSInstructions: Tap the Share button below, then scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen".
inbox.taskUniqueHumanVerificationMeta: Take a photo of your palm
inbox.taskProfileCompletionMeta: Add a name, bio, avatar, or cover

createCommunity.description: Scaffolded shell around the existing community composer composition. Submission is not wired yet.
createCommunity.title: Create a community
createCommunity.verifyPendingDescription: Complete your palm scan to continue.
createCommunity.verifyStartDescription: Scan your palm to prove you're human. No photos or data is saved.

composer.title: Create community
composer.uniqueHumanRequired: Complete unique human verification before creating a community.
composer.ageVerificationRequired: This community is marked 18+, so the creator must also pass age verification before launch.
composer.nationalityDescription: Require members to verify their nationality through self before joining.
composer.minimumAgeDescription: Require members to prove they meet an age threshold through Self.
composer.walletScoreDescription: Require members to meet a Human Passport score threshold.
composer.genderDescription: Require members to match the sex marker on their verified ID document before joining.
composer.erc721Description: Require a linked Ethereum wallet that holds a specific ERC-721 collection.
composer.invalidContractAddress: Enter a valid Ethereum contract address.
composer.courtyardDescription: Create communities based on Pokémon cards, One Piece, and luxury watches.
composer.creatorAgeRequired: The creator must complete age verification before marking a community for adult content.
composer.membershipOpenDetail: Anyone can join immediately. No membership gate or Passport score is required.
composer.membershipRequestDetail: People request access and moderators approve them before they can join.
composer.membershipGatedDetail: People can join immediately after passing at least one wallet, identity, or ownership gate.
composer.anonymousCommunityStableDetail: One persistent anonymous label per user across the entire community. Best for moderation continuity.
composer.anonymousThreadStableDetail: One persistent anonymous label per user per thread. Different threads produce different labels.
composer.anonymousPostEphemeralDetail: Random label per post. No cross-post correlation. Limits moderation and strike capability.
composer.anonymousPostEphemeralDisabled: Post-ephemeral scope is not available in v0.

profile.connectWalletToFollow: Connect your wallet to follow people.
profile.reconnectPrimaryWalletToFollow: Reconnect your primary wallet to follow people.
profile.title: Profile

publicProfile.errorDescription: This public profile could not be loaded right now.
publicProfile.notFoundDescription: We could not find a public profile for {path}.

publicAgent.aboutDescription: Posts and comments from this agent appear across Pirate communities under its canonical .clawitzer identity.
publicAgent.emptyCommunities: Community activity for this agent will appear here.
publicAgent.errorDescription: This public agent could not be loaded right now.
publicAgent.notFoundDescription: We could not find a public agent for {path}.
publicAgent.premiumNamesComingSoon: Premium names will unlock in a later release.

publicCommunity.errorDescription: This community could not be loaded right now.
publicCommunity.verificationCompleted: Verification completed. Try the action again.
publicCommunity.verificationExpired: Verification session expired. Please try again.
publicCommunity.verificationMissingSelf: This community is missing the Self verification details needed to continue.
publicCommunity.verificationSessionLost: Verification session was lost. Start the ID check again.

ownedAgents.activeAgentExistsDescription: Public v0 allows one active OpenClaw agent per verified human.
ownedAgents.importInvalidJsonError: Import payload must be valid JSON.
ownedAgents.importMissingFieldsError: Import payload is missing required OpenClaw fields.
ownedAgents.missingRegistrationUrlError: ClawKey registration URL was not returned.
ownedAgents.ownedAgentsLocalTablesError: Local API is missing agent tables. Restart pirate-api dev server.
ownedAgents.pairingStepInstallPlugin: Install the Pirate Connector if it is not already installed:
ownedAgents.pairingStepInstall: In OpenClaw with Pirate Connector installed, say: connect to Pirate with code {code}
ownedAgents.pairingStepOpen: Then open the ClawKey link OpenClaw sends you.
ownedAgents.premiumNamesComingSoon: Premium names will unlock in a later release.
ownedAgents.verificationRequiredDescription: To connect OpenClaw, Pirate needs to know there is a real person responsible for the agent.

settings.editProfileDescription: Update your display name, bio, or handle.
settings.installAppDescription: Get app-icon unread badges and launch Pirate from your dock.
settings.installAppIOSInstructions: Tap the Share button below, then scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen".
settings.handleRenameUnavailableMessage: This rename is not available right now.
settings.renameRequiresPaidUpgrade: Paid handle changes are not available yet.
settings.title: Settings
settings.handleInvalidMessage: Handles must be 3–30 characters and can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.

notFound.body: This page may have moved, been removed, or never existed.
notFound.title: Page not found

rules.title: Rules
rules.description: Rules set the expectations for members and visitors in your community.
rules.reportingDescription: Users or mods can select a report reason when reporting content.
rules.reportReasonHint: By default, this is the same as your rule name.
rules.defaultRule1Body: No harassment, hate speech, or toxic behavior. Treat all contributors and members with kindness.
rules.defaultRule2Body: Excessive promotion, spam, or advertising of any kind is not allowed.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.regionalPricingDescription: Buyers without verified nationality pay the default price.
pricing.starterTemplateNote: The default map assigns every country across broad pricing bands. Review every group before saving.
pricing.existingListingsNote: Enabling regional pricing affects new listings only. Existing listings keep their current setting.

gates.title: Access and gates
gates.membershipRequestDetail: People request access and moderators approve them before they can join.
gates.membershipGatedDetail: People can join immediately after passing at least one wallet, identity, or ownership gate.
gates.minimumAgeDescription: Require members to prove they meet an age threshold through Self.
gates.walletScoreDescription: Require members to meet a Human Passport score threshold.
gates.genderDescription: Require members to match the sex marker on their verified ID document.
gates.erc721Description: Require a linked Ethereum wallet that holds a specific ERC-721 collection.
gates.invalidContractAddress: Enter a valid Ethereum contract address.
gates.courtyardDescription: Create communities based on Pokémon cards, One Piece, and luxury watches.
gates.readAccessMembersOnlyDetail: Only joined members can read posts.
gates.anonymousScopeCommunityStableDetail: One persistent anonymous label per user across the community.
gates.anonymousScopeThreadStableDetail: One persistent anonymous label per user per thread.
gates.anonymousScopePostEphemeralDetail: Random label per post. Limits moderation continuity.
gates.anonymousScopePostEphemeralDisabledHint: Post-ephemeral scope is not available in v0.
gates.anonymousScopeChangeWarning: Changes apply to new posts only.
gates.ageGateWarning: The owner must complete age verification before marking a community for adult content.

donations.title: Charity
donations.description: Citizens selling pay-to-access images, songs, and videos can donate a share of proceeds to this community via crypto. 0.5% fee.

safety.title: Safety
safety.description: Tune the visual moderation pass for uploaded images and video poster frames.
safety.openAiNote: Text and link posts are not classifier-moderated. Visual checks only enforce the narrow platform floor.
safety.scanImages: Scan uploaded images and video poster frames

agents.title: Agents
agents.description: Control whether user-owned agents can post in this community.

machineAccess.title: Machine access
machineAccess.defaultNotice: Public human-visible surfaces are structured-readable by default.
machineAccess.memberOnlyNotice: Member-only content keeps the same gates and requires authenticated access.
machineAccess.killSwitchNotice: Platform kill switches can disable a community or surface during abuse response.
machineAccess.policyOriginDefault: These are inherited defaults. Save only when this community needs exceptions.

namespaceVerification.title: Verify namespace
namespaceVerification.description: Attach a verified route to this community.
namespaceVerification.spacesStep1Instruction: Run the command below. If it prints "command not found", install Go from https://go.dev/dl/ and reopen Terminal.
namespaceVerification.spacesStep2Instruction: Run the command below to export your Spaces wallet. This file contains your private keys — keep it on your computer and do not share it. You will need the full file path in the next step.
namespaceVerification.spacesStep3Instruction: Copy the command below and replace `/PATH/TO/YOUR/WALLET_EXPORT.json` with your actual wallet export path before running it in Terminal.
namespaceVerification.hnsSetupNote: Add these records to your Handshake name, then verify.

family.handshakeDetail: Add records to your Handshake name to verify ownership.
family.spacesDetail: Verify root ownership by publishing a route.

failure.expired: Verification expired. Generate a new challenge.
failure.dnsSetupRequired: Add the Handshake records, then verify again.
failure.rootResourceUnavailable: Could not read root from chain.
failure.spacesDefault: Could not verify this root. Check the published records and try again.
